title: Build Unite-Group autonomous command-center control plane
description: Implement the service-layer foundation for Unite-Group CRM as an autonomous command center with Phill as human-in-the-loop. Scope: channel intake model, ontology/evidence linking, board/team routing, Margot queue, approval gates, scenario/draft execution, and outcome learning.

title: Add Board input intake for Telegram, Plaud, meetings, and future WhatsApp
description: Create draft-only intake services and route shells for Board/founder/client input. Telegram and Plaud are first-class targets; WhatsApp remains design target until provider, consent, and known-contact policy are verified.

title: Add Margot queue and @team dispatch panel to Command Center
description: Add a Command Center panel showing @team dispatches, Margot follow-up queue, Board packets, blocked items, approval controls, and next actions.

title: Add presentation QA gate for generated board/live-event materials
description: Build presentation QA service/checklist for generated visual boards, live-event decks, and client materials. Must catch text overlap, clipping, mobile overflow, broken interactions, poor reading order, and missing evidence/approval state before export.
